title: The Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957
full_text: The Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195766 Act Number: 66 Enactment Date: 1957-12-28 Act Year: 1957 Short Title: The Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the Municipal Government of Delhi. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 02-01-1958 Notification: 2nd January, 1958, vide notification No. F. 20/3/58/SR (R), dated 31st December, 1957, in respect of S. 2, Chap. II, ss. 54, 55, 56, 57, 58, 59, 89 and 97, Chap. XXIII, ss. 485, 487, 488, 491, 500, 509, 513 and 515, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part IV. 15th February, 1958, vide notification No. F. 20/3/58/SR (R), dated 11th February, 1958, in respect of S. 510, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part IV. 7th April, 1958, vide notification No. F. 20/3/58/SR (R), dated 5th April, 1958, in respect of All the provisions of the Act (other than those which have already been brought into force), see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part IV. the Corporation Election of councillors and aldermen Disputes regarding elections Corrupt practices and electoral offences Power to make rules Councillors and aldermen Mayor and Deputy Mayor Commissioner Miscellaneous provisions relating to the various municipal authorities CHAPTER V PROCEDURE Transaction of business by the Corporation Transaction of business by Standing and other committees Minutes and reports of proceedings Validation CHAPTER VI MUNICIPAL OFFICERS AND OTHER MUNICIPAL EMPLOYEES CHAPTER VII REVENUE AND EXPENDITURE The Municipal Fund Special fund Budget estimates CHAPTER VIII TAXATION Levy of taxes Property taxes Tax on vehicles and animals Theatre-tax Tax on advertisements other than advertisements published in the newspapers Duty on transfer of property Tax on buildings payable along with the application for sanction of building plans Other taxes Supplementary taxation Payment and recovery of taxes Remission and Refund Appeals Miscellaneous provisions relating to taxation Terminal taxes on goods Taxes on entertainment and betting CHAPTER IX BORROWING CHAPTER X PROPERTY AND CONTRACTS Property Contracts CHAPTER XI ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT Miscellaneous CHAPTER XIII ELECTRICITY SUPPLY CHAPTER XIV TRANSPORT SERVICES CHAPTER XV STREETS Construction, maintenance and improvement of streets Encroachments on streets Provision concerning execution of works in or near to streets Naming and numbering of streets and numbering of buildings Repairs or enclosure of dangerous places Lighting of streets CHAPTER XVI BUILDING REGULATIONS CHAPTER XVII SANITATION AND PUBLIC HEALTH Conservancy and sanitation Latrines and urinals Removal of congested buildings and buildings unfit for human habitation Regulation of washing by washermen Prevention of dangerous diseases Special conditions regarding essential services Burning and burial grounds Disposal of dead animals CHAPTER XVIII VITAL STATISTICS CHAPTER XIX PUBLIC SAFETY AND
